items.p: With "AEW Collision" moved to a Thursday night slot to avoid clashing with the Fourth of July, the show took a hit in the TV ratings.

items.h: Judge Rules AEW Can't Fully Seal Wrestler Contracts As Part Of Ryan Nemeth Dispute
